claimText: HKU's Guidelines on the Responsible Use of Generative AI in Research were formally approved by the Senate on September 23, 2025 and are now in effect.

citation.citationTitle: Guidelines on the Responsible Use of Generative AI in Research at HKU
citation.publisher: The University of Hong Kong - Research Services
